description: §65.2.4 — mutually-exclusive attribute VALUES on one attribute (`[type="submit"]` vs `[type="button"]`) are provably disjoint: no single element can carry both `type` values at once. Two rules both setting `color` on those disjoint selectors is not a conflict → no diagnostic.
rationale: §65.2.4 decidable core: attribute-presence and mutually-exclusive attribute values on one attribute (`[type="submit"]` vs `[type="button"]`) are provably disjoint. The checker proves no shared element and stays silent — neither hard nor soft.
